---
title: "An Intro to Blogging"
description: "An attempt to getting back into working on my website, and updating people on my current life"
author:
  - name: Sam Lance
date: 05-1-2026
categories: [Life Updates] # self-defined categories
image: river_meander.jpg
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---

# **Welcome Back!**

Long time no update! Last I posted I actually had not even taken my offer to be a PhD student just yet, and here I am just now wrapping up the end of my first (academic) year. Now I've TA'd for two different classes, started a new project, and presented a talk at my first ever conference.

I hope in the next few months this can be a space for small updates on projects I have going on, any helpful guides I am workshopping at the moment, or just talking about anything that has come up in my academic life I think warrants a post! 

  ![](river_meander.jpg)
